meaning: adj.楔状的n.[解] 楔状骨,蝶骨
examples: Sphenoid wing dysplasia is one of six clinical criteria for the diagnosis of NF-1.
The most likely cause of sphenoid dysplasia is defective ossification of the sphenoid bone.
In patients with NF-1, sphenoid wing dysplasia was initially thought to be congenital and non-progressive.
